name: Rolled Pasta with Radicchio, Pancetta, and Ba
recipeIngredient: 1 Head Radicchio (or 1 lb. thinly sliced to yield 2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 3 quarts water to a boil in a large pot. Add salt, then the dried pasta. Cook until "al dente" (8-10 minutes).
2. Meanwhile, heat olive oil and butter in a skillet over medium heat. Add shallots and pancetta; cook until shallots are softened and pancetta begins to crisp.
3. Add radicchio to the skillet and sauté until it wilts.
4. Transfer contents of the skillet to a bowl. Toss with grated Parmesan cheese, salt, and pepper to taste.
5. Serve hot.
